title: 实现 AgentExecutor 统一执行器
description: 实现核心执行器 AgentExecutor，协调适配器选择、进程启动、输出收集、事件发布。参考 Maestro 的 CliAgentRunner 设计，支持多 Agent 类型(Claude, Gemini, Qwen, Codex, OpenCode)和两种后端模式(Direct, Terminal)

criteria: AgentExecutor.run() 方法可接受 RunOptions 并返回 ExecutionResult
支持 AgentType.CLAUDE_CODE, GEMINI, QWEN, CODEX, OPENCODE
python -c 'from tflow.core.executor import AgentExecutor, AgentType, RunOptions' 无报错
convergence.verification: python -c 'from tflow.core.executor import AgentExecutor, AgentType, RunOptions; e = AgentExecutor(); print("OK")'

implementation: 创建 src/tflow/core/__init__.py 导出 AgentExecutor 等
实现 AgentType 枚举 (CLAUDE_CODE, GEMINI, QWEN, CODEX, OPENCODE)
实现 ExecutionMode 枚举 (ANALYSIS, WRITE)
实现 BackendType 枚举 (DIRECT, TERMINAL)
实现 RunOptions dataclass (prompt, tool, mode, work_dir, model, backend 等)
实现 ExecutionResult dataclass (exec_id, exit_code, output, success, duration_ms)
实现 AgentProcess 类封装 subprocess.Popen
实现 AgentExecutor 类: run() 同步执行, run_async() 异步执行
实现 _build_command() 构建各 Agent 特定命令行
实现 _assemble_prompt() 组装差异化 prompt

commands: python -c 'from tflow.core.executor import AgentExecutor, AgentType, RunOptions; print("OK")'

reference.pattern: 遵循设计文档 4.1 节 AgentExecutor 设计，参考 Maestro CliAgentRunner
